_comment: WC2026 Round of 32, 2026-07-03, Toronto. KNOCKOUT: no draw -- level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties, so the deliverable is who ADVANCES. Winner meets the Spain (who beat Austria 3-0) in the Round of 16. Routes: Portugal finished 2nd in Group K (1-1 DR Congo, 4-0 Uzbekistan, 0-0 Colombia; 5 pts, GF 5 GA 1, rating 90) -- a quality side with a SOLID defence (GA 1), but one that can be BLUNT vs an organized block (drew 0-0 Colombia and 1-1 DR Congo) while ROUTING the weak (4-0 Uzbekistan). Croatia finished 2nd in Group L (2-4 England, 1-0 Panama, 2-1 Ghana; 6 pts, GF 5 GA 5, GD 0, rating 84) -- experienced, tactically savvy, tournament-tough (grind-it-out wins over Panama and Ghana), though they shipped 4 in the open loss to England. KEY texture: this is NOT the Austria/rout archetype. Croatia is NOT an open, leaky side that gives the favourite space -- they are an ORGANIZED, control side with genuine knockout pedigree (a habitual extra-time/penalties team), exactly the kind of block that has frustrated Portugal (0-0 Colombia, 1-1 Congo). Class gap ~6 (90 vs 84) -> Portugal a MODERATE favourite, but a close, lower-scoring, DEEP tie with elevated extra-time/penalty risk, not a rout. Portugal the favourite by class + defence; Croatia a dangerous, savvy underdog who thrives when the tie goes long. Home = Portugal (nominal; neutral venue). Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Single-elimination: level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties. Winner faces Spain in the R16. Portugal a moderate favourite (2nd in Group K, rating 90, GA 1) vs an organized, tournament-tough Croatia (2nd in Group L, rating 84) with real knockout pedigree. A close, lower-scoring, DEEP tie -- elevated extra-time/penalty risk, NOT a rout.

home.name: Portugal
notes: Quality (rating 90) with a solid defence (GA 1). But BLUNT vs an organized block (0-0 Colombia, 1-1 DR Congo) -- and Croatia is a block. attack 1.05.
Solid at the back (GA 1, three tough games). defense 0.90.
Moderate favourite; a control side opposite -> lower-scoring, deeper tie, not a rout.

away.name: Croatia
notes: Experienced, savvy, tournament-tough (grind wins over Panama, Ghana); can score but not prolific. attack 0.95.
Organized (though shipped 4 to England in an open game); a control side that slows the tie. defense 1.0.
Knockout pedigree -> thrives deep; real extra-time/penalty upset equity.

_recal: First pass landed at Portugal 45.7 / Draw 27.2 / Croatia 27.1 vs market de-vig 43.7 / 29.4 / 26.9 -- max divergence 2.2 pts, ALIGNED (MEDIUM), no lift/trim needed. A genuinely close tie: Portugal the moderate favourite, Croatia a savvy, deep-tie underdog. High ET/penalty risk baked in (27% ET, 14% pens).
